title: 10 Glaucoma Herbal Creams to Treat Eye Floaters
description: Achillea millefolium creams have been used to help alleviate eye floaters due to their anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The cream contains constituents like sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids, which may help reduce inflammation and oxidative stress in the eye. These compounds can help protect the delicate tissues of the eye and improve blood flow to the area, potentially reducing the appearance of floaters.
